note: Settings A/B as PROFILES on ONE base model — no Modelfile variants needed; ollama accepts every sampling parameter per-request. Values are Unsloth's authoritative Qwen3.6 recommendations (memory 41771769): thinking-mode GENERAL = temp 1.0, PRECISE CODING = temp 0.6, both with top_p 0.95 / top_k 20 / min_p 0 / presence_penalty 0 / repeat_penalty 1. The two profiles differ ONLY in temperature, isolating 'does the coding-vs-general temperature change the fidelity reading?'. NOTE: temperature 0 is OFF-DISTRIBUTION for this model (appears nowhere in Unsloth's recipe) and was verified to break it — at temp 0 the model degenerated into thinking-loops AND failed the no-compaction control. So neither profile uses temp 0; reproducibility comes from the fixed seed at the recommended temperature. num_ctx held constant (ample for these small probe contexts); num_predict caps a runaway generation cheaply. Set the base model to your loaded Qwen3.6 tag (e.g. qwen3.6:27b or qwen3.6:35b-a3b).
